dialogueChunks.intro: The rivalry over {quest_focus} has turned ugly. Someone tampered with supplies meant for {quest_ally}, and suspicion falls on {target_npc}'s supporters.
dialogueChunks.plotStep: Whether it's actual sabotage or just paranoia, the damage is done. Both sides are accusing the other while {quest_threat} erodes the settlement's cohesion. The {enemy_type} near {location_hint} are taking advantage of the chaos.
dialogueChunks.outro: Get out to {location} and deal with the real problems while these fools tear each other apart. Bring back {quest_item} to replenish what was lost.

playerResponses.text: I'll fix the damage they've caused.
Someone needs to be the adult here.

dialogueChunks.intro: The competition around {quest_focus} became public. {quest_ally} openly mocked {target_npc}'s abilities in front of the settlement, and now {target_npc} is refusing to contribute to any communal work.
dialogueChunks.plotStep: With {target_npc} on strike, the settlement's defenses {location_hint} are understaffed. {quest_threat} has left gaps that the {enemy_type} will exploit. We need someone to cover those gaps and deliver a message to {target_npc}.
dialogueChunks.outro: Shore up our weak points and try to talk {target_npc} back to reason. {quest_stakes} can't afford this standoff.

playerResponses.text: I'll handle the gaps and the grudge.

dialogueChunks.intro: Both rivals have upped the stakes on {quest_focus}. {quest_ally} ventured deep toward {location} alone to prove a point and hasn't returned on time.
dialogueChunks.plotStep: {target_npc} is torn between concern and satisfaction. The area near {location_hint} is crawling with {enemy_type}, and {quest_threat} may have finally produced real consequences. Someone needs to check the route and make sure {quest_ally} is safe.
dialogueChunks.outro: Track {quest_ally}'s path, clear any hostiles, and make sure this stupid rivalry doesn't cost us someone we can't replace.

playerResponses.text: I'll bring them back in one piece.
